Off Calendar Feb-02-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Nancy Newman, 415.777.3200 of Hanson Bridgett LLP appearing via Zoom for Plaintiffs Jason Lee Suey and Cristina Lee Suey.
Cheryl Rouse, 415.575.9444 of The Law Offices of Rouse & Bahert appearing via Zoom for Defendant Miriam Wong.
Mark Iezza, 415.951.0535 of Klein, Hockel, Iezza & Patel P.C. appearing via Zoom for Defendant Harry Wong.

Overbid commences for 154-156 Funston Avenue in San Francisco California.

The current offer is $2,000,000. The first overbid price is 2,100,500. The final overbid offer was acceted at $2,500,500. The buyer is Har-Kwan Luk. Stephen Wong is the agent for Mr. Luk.

Hearing held. The Court rules as follows: NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR REFEREE'S FINAL REPORT OF SALE OF REAL PROPERTY LOCATED AT 154-156 FUNSTON AVENUE PURSUANT TO INTERLOCUTORY JUDGMENT FOR PARTITION DATED DECEMBER 22, 2021 is Granted. 154-156 Funston Avenue in San Francisco California is sold for $2,500,500 to Mr. Har-Kwan Luk. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
